neck_pain.name: Neck Stretch
neck_pain.description: Gently tilt your head to each side, holding for 15 seconds

neck_pain.name: Chin Tuck
neck_pain.description: Pull your chin straight back, creating a double chin

neck_pain.name: Neck Rotation
neck_pain.description: Slowly turn your head left and right

back_pain.name: Child's Pose
back_pain.description: Kneel on the floor, sit back on your heels, reach arms forward

back_pain.name: Cat Cow Stretch
back_pain.description: On hands and knees, alternate between arching and rounding your back

back_pain.name: Pelvic Tilt
back_pain.description: Lie on your back, flatten your lower back against the floor

knee_pain.name: Straight Leg Raise
knee_pain.description: Lie on your back, lift straight leg to 45 degrees

knee_pain.name: Hamstring Stretch
knee_pain.description: Sit with leg straight, reach toward toes
